LUXURY RETAIL CONSTRUCTION

Who We Are

We are builders, craftsmen, and problem‑solvers dedicated to creating exceptional retail environments through relentless communication.

For 25 years, Lux Brand Co. has delivered world‑class construction across the country's most prestigious retail addresses.

While many in this field choose to construct, we choose to collaborate. Craftsmanship is the assumption — clarity is the ultimate luxury.

From flagship stores to intimate boutiques, every project receives our full commitment to excellence.

Lux Brand Co. has built for the world's most exacting brands — from Vancouver to Manhattan, Los Angeles to Miami. Our relationships are with the brand, not the city. The deeper the relationship, the more value we add.

Our Approach
01
Listen

We begin by understanding your brand, vision, and requirements — before a single plan is drawn.

02
Collaborate

Our team works alongside designers, architects, and brand stakeholders from concept through completion.

03
Deliver

We execute with precision, on schedule, and to the exacting standards your brand demands.

Every project is unique — demanding a tailored approach and unwavering focus.

We bring decades of experience to solve complex challenges with innovative solutions.

Live to Give

We believe success is measured by the positive impact we make in our communities.

Through skills training, apprenticeships, and charitable partnerships, we invest in people and neighborhoods.

With a Live to Give philosophy, we generously support local trade schools — equipping the next generation of craftspeople with skills that create lasting economic value for their families and communities.

So are we.
